notes: L27 Part 1 (act 159) 'Minimum Window Substring — sliding window mechanics', 100.6s, 8 cues. Reuses arrays.py (value_row/window_bracket/pointer/code_line/complexity) + bayes.chip; NOT transformer scenes. MathTex only for O(|s|+|t|). s=ADOBECODEBANC t=ABC answer=BANC. READ start/mid/end each cue (tail cue07 has no _end boundary frame — expected). All cues legible, in-frame (safe-area guard passed), on-brand dark palette; both pointers monotonic-forward story correct. 1 -ql iteration, no defects.
